Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anna Liu, Esq. (415-956-6488) for Hester Michael, Plaintiff and moving party / No appearances by Defendant and opposing party

Court adopts the tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF HESTER MICHAEL's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Incorporation by reference of 13 into each cause of action and prayer for special economic loss damages in unspecified amount renders the complaint uncertain. Order is signed in open court Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

HEARING - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS LILY NG, THERESE LEE, and RINGO LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted, motion to strike to reconcile prayer and inclusion of paragraph 13 re UCL cause of action. HEARING - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THERESE LEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to specify damages for non-personal injury cause of action.
